title: 并列连词
prompt_en: Practice using and or but so to connect ideas smoothly.
description: 掌握and(添加)/but(转折)/or(选择)/so(因果)的基本用法。
knowledge_points: 并列连词 转折 因果

title: 对比与选择
prompt_en: Practice expressing contrast with however whereas yet.
prompt_zh: 练习用however/whereas/yet表达对比和选择。
description: 学习用however/whereas/yet/still表达更丰富的对比。
knowledge_points: 对比 选择 然而 另一方面

title: 因果关系
prompt_en: Practice expressing cause and effect with because since therefore.
description: 掌握because(直接原因)/since(已知原因)/therefore(结果)的区别。
knowledge_points: 因果 原因 结果

title: 让步关系
prompt_en: Practice expressing concession with although even though despite.
description: 学习although+从句/despite+名词两种让步结构。
knowledge_points: 让步 虽然 尽管

title: 时间与条件从句
prompt_en: Practice when while before after if unless clauses.
description: 掌握时间从句和条件从句的用法和时态搭配。

title: 定语从句
prompt_en: Practice who which that relative clauses.
description: 掌握定语从句修饰人(who)和修饰物(which/that)的区别。
knowledge_points: 定语从句 关系代词 修饰
